content:
**🎁 DC 56000守密人入驻达成礼 ┊ Discord 56,000 Keepers Milestone Reward**

《忘却前夜》官方Discord现有超过56000位守密人入驻啦🎉！感谢每一位守密人的喜爱与陪伴，请复制下方兑换码到「设置」→「账户」→「兑换码」处领取礼包吧~

🔹 兑换码：`HJVA-RLMF-RELF`
🔹 礼包内容：银芯×500、无垢之芯×5
🔹 有效期至<t:1785167940:f>

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

The Morimens Official Discord has reached 56,000 Keepers🎉! Thank you to every Keeper for your love and support along the way. To claim your gift, simply copy the redemption code below and head to [Settings] → [Account] → [Redemption Code].

🔹 Redemption Code: `HJVA-RLMF-RELF`
🔹 Gift Contents: Silver ×500, Pure Core ×5
🔹 Valid until: <t:1785167940:f>

@everyone
